commands.review_summary:
This PR adds current-attempt replay metadata through the embedded agent subscription/attempt-result path and switches the silent provider-error retry guard to use that metadata, with focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +59, Tests +131. Total +190 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main feeds accumulated replay state into attempts and the retry helper blocks on replayMetadata.hadPotentialSideEffects. I did not run a live OpenRouter 5xx reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is maintainer/contributor validation for a user-visible runtime retry path, not a narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair automatically.

target.title: Fix silent provider-error retry after prior side effects
target.body:
Fixes #97877

## What Problem This Solves

Transient provider errors that return `stopReason="error"` with no visible output could skip the existing empty-error retry path after an earlier tool side effect had marked the accumulated replay metadata unsafe. In that case the user could get no Discord reply even though the failed provider call itself did not run tools or deliver output.

## Why This Change Was Made

This separates cumulative replay safety from current-attempt replay safety. `replayMetadata` remains cumulative for liveness, compaction, and replay-invalid reporting, while `currentAttemptReplayMetadata` records side effects from the active outer attempt only. The silent provider-error retry gate now checks current-attempt metadata, with a legacy fallback to `replayMetadata` for bundled or external harnesses that have not started returning the new field yet.

The current-attempt state stays monotonic across in-attempt compaction retries, so side effects before compaction cannot be erased before a later provider error in the same attempt.

## User Impact

OpenClaw can retry empty transient provider errors after prior session or retry-history side effects when the failed model call itself was safe to replay. Attempts that actually produced tools, deliveries, cron writes, async work, or other current-attempt side effects remain blocked from retry to avoid duplicating actions.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.loop.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.media.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-owned-tool-runtime-contract.test.ts src/agents/harness/selection.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts` — 9 files, 420 tests passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:core && pnpm tsgo:test:src` — passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ...` for touched agent runner/subscription/test files — passed.
- `git diff --check` — passed.
- `pnpm check:changed -- <touched files>` was attempted but did not reach repo checks because the local Crabbox binary is `0.18.0` and the Testbox delegate requires Crabbox `>= 0.22.0`.
